nasb.text: You shall not distort justice; you shall not be partial, and you shall not take a bribe, for a bribe blinds the eyes of the wise and perverts the words of the righteous.

esv.text: You shall not pervert justice. You shall not show partiality, and you shall not accept a bribe, for a bribe blinds the eyes of the wise and subverts the cause of the righteous.

cnv.text: 不可屈枉正直，不可徇人的情面，不可收受賄賂，因為賄賂能使智慧人的眼變瞎，也能使義人的話顛倒過來。

ccb.text: 不可徇私枉法、偏心待人，收受贿赂，因为贿赂能蒙蔽智者的眼睛，使正直人颠倒是非。
